tools.name: createApiKey
tools.description: Create a new API key with a name, scopes, and optional expiration.

tools.name: listApiKeys
tools.description: List all API keys with their status, scopes, and last usage time.

tools.name: revokeApiKey
tools.description: Revoke an API key immediately, disabling all future requests with it.

tools.name: rotateApiKey
tools.description: Rotate an API key, creating a new one and scheduling the old one for expiration.

tools.name: getKeyUsage
tools.description: Get usage statistics for a specific API key.

tools.name: createWebhook
tools.description: Create a new webhook endpoint with a URL and event subscriptions.

tools.name: listWebhooks
tools.description: List all configured webhooks with their status and success rates.

tools.name: testWebhook
tools.description: Send a test event to a webhook endpoint to verify it

tools.name: getDeliveryLogs
tools.description: Get delivery logs for a webhook showing status, response time, and retries.

tools.name: getRequestLogs
tools.description: Get API request logs with method, path, status, and latency.

tools.name: getUsageStats
tools.description: Get aggregated API usage statistics with endpoint breakdowns.

tools.name: exportLogs
tools.description: Export request or delivery logs in CSV or JSON format.
